step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the provided explanation for choosing option B "Increase contrast." The use of an intensifying screen enhances image clarity and detail by efficiently converting lower energy photons from the x-rays into visible light, which then interacts with the film to produce a higher-contrast image compared to direct-film exposures without such screens. Additionally, this improvement in contrast helps differentiate various anatomical structures better during interpretation, making diagnostic information clearer despite not reducing actual radiation dosage delivered to the patient. Therefore,
